evidence: FGAP-113 edge-orientation class fix verified on merged main (3bc3d7a4). Gates: npm run build / check / test all exit 0 (pi-context 1211 tests pass). Runtime demos via the real global CLI against .context + scratch dryRun. Fresh-context adversarial probe independently re-derived all 10 criteria: PASS, zero defects. Orchestrator independently re-verified the load-bearing claims (deriver byte-identical, write reject, read signal, integrity).

criteria_results.criterion: Every orientation-bearing relation_type carries role metadata or is exempt
criteria_results.evidence: read-config: exactly 17 relations carry role_direction (9 as_parent, 8 as_child), matching the catalog; the other 27 (no role consumer) omit it; catalog-lock test asserts the exact set + schema enum

criteria_results.criterion: WRITE rejects a backwards orientation-bearing edge, never auto-orients, no false-positives
criteria_results.evidence: dryRun: bare same-kind/wildcard appends (task_depends_on_task, story_depends_on_story, milestone_precedes_milestone, item_derived_from_item) REJECTED with orientation-naming message; disjoint task_positioned_in_phase + role-less task_addresses_gap bare appends ALLOWED; no orientOrderingEdge/swap path exists
item_derived_from_item (source/target *) bare append rejected; role-typed --primary/--counter accepted, maps as_child (source at child)

criteria_results.criterion: READ signals wrong-end instead of silent-empty

contains/includes = as_parent (container=parent); positioned_in = as_child (container=child); encoded per-relation in the metadata + documented on the schema and context.ts surface

criteria_results.evidence: role_direction reverse-engineered from the stored convention so zero edges were inverted; migration commit 30e86f1a touched only config.json/migrations.json, no relations.json; context-validate-relations clean
